candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line for cost of revenues/COGS, shown as a separate same-level component beneath the selected COGS parent row 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold'. Because the selected COGS bucket uses the parent total row, this D&A appears embedded within that bucket rather than outside it, so it should not be added separately to avoid double counting.
This is SG&A-related D&A, not COGS-related, so it is not relevant for the COGS_DA bucket.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold'. The statement shows 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS' as a component within that total alongside other COGS components, so D&A is already included in the selected COGS row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line for SG&A, presented separately from the selected XSGA component rows 'Labor & Related Expenses in SGA', 'Advertising Expenses', and 'Other Operating Expenses - remaining'. Since the selected XSGA bucket is built from components and does not itself include this standalone D&A line, it should be added separately later.
This is COGS-related D&A, not SG&A-related, so it is not relevant for the XSGA_DA bucket.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket excludes the separate SG&A D&A line: it consists only of 'Labor & Related Expenses in SGA', 'Advertising Expenses', and 'Other Operating Expenses - remaining'. No R&D row is visible and XRD is empty, so there is no separate R&D interaction preventing inclusion.
